csv:
Requirement ID,Shall Statement,Update Date,Test Case ID
X-SW-REQ-001,The system shall authenticate users using approved credentials.,2025-01-15,
X-SW-REQ-002,The system shall enforce role-based access controls for protected functions.,2025-01-19,TC-C2002
X-SW-REQ-003,The system shall log successful and failed user sign-in attempts.,2025-01-23,
X-SW-REQ-004,The system shall lock a user account after five consecutive failed sign-in attempts.,2025-01-27,TC-C2004
X-SW-REQ-005,The system shall allow authorized administrators to reset user account passwords.,2025-01-31,
X-SW-REQ-006,The system shall require passwords to meet the configured complexity policy.,2025-02-04,TC-C2006
X-SW-REQ-007,The system shall expire temporary passwords after first successful use.,2025-02-08,
X-SW-REQ-008,The system shall encrypt sensitive data while stored in the system database.,2025-02-12,TC-C2008
X-SW-REQ-009,The system shall encrypt sensitive data while transmitted over external interfaces.,2025-02-16,
X-SW-REQ-010,The system shall validate all required fields before saving a user record.,2025-02-20,TC-C2010
X-SW-REQ-011,The system shall display a clear validation message for invalid user input.,2025-02-24,
X-SW-REQ-012,The system shall prevent duplicate user accounts with the same email address.,2025-02-28,TC-C2012
X-SW-REQ-013,The system shall record the creation time and creator for each managed record.,2025-03-04,
X-SW-REQ-014,The system shall record the last modification time and modifier for each managed record.,2025-03-08,TC-C2014
X-SW-REQ-015,The system shall retain audit records for at least seven years.,2025-03-12,
X-SW-REQ-016,The system shall allow authorized users to search records by identifier.,2025-03-16,TC-C2016
X-SW-REQ-017,The system shall allow authorized users to filter records by status and date range.,2025-03-20,
X-SW-REQ-018,The system shall present search results in pageable lists.,2025-03-24,TC-C2018
X-SW-REQ-019,The system shall export authorized search results to comma-separated values format.,2025-03-28,
X-SW-REQ-020,The system shall generate a printable report for an individual record.,2025-04-01,TC-C2020
X-SW-REQ-021,The system shall assign a unique system-generated identifier to each new record.,2025-04-05,
X-SW-REQ-022,The system shall prevent deletion of records that are referenced by active transactions.,2025-04-09,TC-C2022
X-SW-REQ-023,The system shall allow authorized users to archive inactive records.,2025-04-13,
X-SW-REQ-024,The system shall restore archived records only for authorized administrators.,2025-04-17,TC-C2024
X-SW-REQ-025,The system shall display record status using configured status values.,2025-04-21,
X-SW-REQ-026,The system shall notify assigned users when a record is created.,2025-04-25,TC-C2026
X-SW-REQ-027,The system shall notify assigned users when a record is reassigned.,2025-04-29,
X-SW-REQ-028,The system shall notify owners when a record approaches its due date.,2025-05-03,TC-C2028
X-SW-REQ-029,The system shall allow users to acknowledge system notifications.,2025-05-07,
X-SW-REQ-030,The system shall maintain notification delivery history for each notification.,2025-05-11,TC-C2030
X-SW-REQ-031,The system shall synchronize system time with an approved time source.,2025-05-15,
X-SW-REQ-032,The system shall record timestamps in Coordinated Universal Time.,2025-05-19,TC-C2032
X-SW-REQ-033,The system shall display timestamps in the user-selected local time zone.,2025-05-23,
X-SW-REQ-034,The system shall support concurrent access by at least 200 active users.,2025-05-27,TC-C2034
X-SW-REQ-035,The system shall complete standard record retrieval operations within two seconds under normal load.,2025-05-31,
X-SW-REQ-036,The system shall complete standard record save operations within three seconds under normal load.,2025-06-04,TC-C2036
X-SW-REQ-037,The system shall recover service availability within fifteen minutes after a planned restart.,2025-06-08,
X-SW-REQ-038,The system shall perform scheduled backups at least once every 24 hours.,2025-06-12,TC-C2038
X-SW-REQ-039,The system shall verify backup integrity after each scheduled backup.,2025-06-16,
X-SW-REQ-040,The system shall restore backed-up data to a designated recovery environment.,2025-06-20,TC-C2040
X-SW-REQ-041,The system shall monitor application availability and generate an alert after service interruption.,2025-06-24,
X-SW-REQ-042,The system shall monitor available storage capacity and alert when remaining capacity falls below 20 percent.,2025-06-28,TC-C2042
X-SW-REQ-043,The system shall restrict administrative functions to authenticated administrator roles.,2025-07-02,
X-SW-REQ-044,The system shall terminate inactive user sessions after 30 minutes.,2025-07-06,TC-C2044
X-SW-REQ-045,The system shall prevent session identifiers from being reused after user sign-out.,2025-07-10,
X-SW-REQ-046,The system shall require multi-factor authentication for administrator sign-in.,2025-07-14,TC-C2046
X-SW-REQ-047,The system shall record security-relevant configuration changes in the audit log.,2025-07-18,
X-SW-REQ-048,The system shall allow administrators to configure password expiration periods.,2025-07-22,TC-C2048
X-SW-REQ-049,The system shall allow administrators to configure notification delivery preferences.,2025-07-26,
X-SW-REQ-050,The system shall validate imported data against the approved import schema.,2025-07-30,TC-C2050
X-SW-REQ-051,The system shall reject import files that contain unrecognized columns.,2025-08-03,
X-SW-REQ-052,The system shall provide an import error report for rejected data rows.,2025-08-07,TC-C2052
X-SW-REQ-053,The system shall process valid import rows without discarding valid rows because of unrelated errors.,2025-08-11,
X-SW-REQ-054,The system shall maintain an import transaction summary for each upload.,2025-08-15,TC-C2054
X-SW-REQ-055,The system shall allow authorized users to download the approved import template.,2025-08-19,
X-SW-REQ-056,The system shall provide an application programming interface for authorized external integrations.,2025-08-23,TC-C2056
X-SW-REQ-057,The system shall authenticate external application programming interface requests using approved tokens.,2025-08-27,
X-SW-REQ-058,The system shall return standardized error responses for invalid application programming interface requests.,2025-08-31,TC-C2058
X-SW-REQ-059,The system shall limit application programming interface requests according to configured rate limits.,2025-09-04,
X-SW-REQ-060,The system shall maintain version compatibility for published application programming interface endpoints.,2025-09-08,TC-C2060
X-SW-REQ-061,The system shall validate outbound messages before transmission to external systems.,2025-09-12,
X-SW-REQ-062,The system shall retry failed outbound integrations according to the configured retry policy.,2025-09-16,TC-C2062
X-SW-REQ-063,The system shall record integration failures with sufficient diagnostic detail.,2025-09-20,
X-SW-REQ-064,The system shall allow authorized users to view integration status.,2025-09-24,TC-C2064
X-SW-REQ-065,The system shall prevent unauthorized modification of system configuration values.,2025-09-28,
X-SW-REQ-066,The system shall maintain configuration change history.,2025-10-02,TC-C2066
X-SW-REQ-067,The system shall require approval before applying production configuration changes.,2025-10-06,
X-SW-REQ-068,The system shall display the current application version to authorized administrators.,2025-10-10,TC-C2068
X-SW-REQ-069,The system shall provide online help for primary user workflows.,2025-10-14,
X-SW-REQ-070,The system shall provide accessible labels for interactive user interface controls.,2025-10-18,TC-C2070
X-SW-REQ-071,The system shall support keyboard-only navigation for all primary user interface functions.,2025-10-22,
X-SW-REQ-072,The system shall meet applicable contrast requirements for user interface text and controls.,2025-10-26,TC-C2072
X-SW-REQ-073,The system shall display meaningful error messages without exposing sensitive system details.,2025-10-30,
X-SW-REQ-074,The system shall confirm destructive user actions before executing them.,2025-11-03,TC-C2074
X-SW-REQ-075,The system shall allow users to cancel a record edit before saving changes.,2025-11-07,
X-SW-REQ-076,The system shall preserve unsaved user-entered data during recoverable validation failures.,2025-11-11,TC-C2076
X-SW-REQ-077,The system shall sort list views by user-selected supported columns.,2025-11-15,
X-SW-REQ-078,The system shall allow users to configure visible columns in supported list views.,2025-11-19,TC-C2078
X-SW-REQ-079,The system shall retain user display preferences across sessions.,2025-11-23,
X-SW-REQ-080,The system shall generate unique correlation identifiers for externally initiated transactions.,2025-11-27,TC-C2080
X-SW-REQ-081,The system shall include correlation identifiers in relevant application logs.,2025-12-01,
X-SW-REQ-082,The system shall protect log files from unauthorized modification.,2025-12-05,TC-C2082
X-SW-REQ-083,The system shall rotate application logs according to the configured retention policy.,2025-12-09,
X-SW-REQ-084,The system shall provide health-check endpoints for monitoring systems.,2025-12-13,TC-C2084
X-SW-REQ-085,The system shall report system dependency health through the health-check endpoint.,2025-12-17,
X-SW-REQ-086,The system shall prevent unsupported browser versions from accessing protected workflows.,2025-12-21,TC-C2086
X-SW-REQ-087,The system shall display a supported-browser message when access is denied.,2025-12-25,
X-SW-REQ-088,The system shall maintain compatibility with the approved operating system environments.,2025-12-29,TC-C2088
X-SW-REQ-089,The system shall validate all uploaded files for allowed type and size before storage.,2026-01-02,
X-SW-REQ-090,The system shall scan uploaded files for malicious content before making them available.,2026-01-06,TC-C2090
X-SW-REQ-091,The system shall store uploaded files using system-generated filenames.,2026-01-10,
X-SW-REQ-092,The system shall restrict download of uploaded files to authorized users.,2026-01-14,TC-C2092
X-SW-REQ-093,The system shall retain document version history for managed documents.,2026-01-18,
X-SW-REQ-094,The system shall allow authorized users to compare two versions of a managed document.,2026-01-22,TC-C2094
X-SW-REQ-095,The system shall generate an audit event when a managed document is downloaded.,2026-01-26,
X-SW-REQ-096,The system shall support configurable data-retention periods by record category.,2026-01-30,TC-C2096
X-SW-REQ-097,The system shall permanently delete expired records after the approved retention period.,2026-02-03,
X-SW-REQ-098,The system shall generate a retention action report for authorized administrators.,2026-02-07,TC-C2098
X-SW-REQ-099,The system shall provide operational metrics for request volume and response time.,2026-02-11,
X-SW-REQ-100,The system shall allow administrators to view system error trends.,2026-02-15,TC-C2100
